CRITICAL_SOUNDTRACK.AssignHint: Playlist "{playlist}" will play when this character scores a critical hit.
CRITICAL_SOUNDTRACK.NoActors: No actors found in this world.
CRITICAL_SOUNDTRACK.NoPlaylistWarning: {name} has no critical soundtrack playlist assigned.
CRITICAL_SOUNDTRACK.SettingEnabledHint: Enable or disable the module without removing settings.
CRITICAL_SOUNDTRACK.SettingOnlyPCsHint: When enabled, soundtracks only trigger for player characters (type = character).
CRITICAL_SOUNDTRACK.SettingShowWarningsH: Show a notification when a critical hit occurs but the character has no playlist assigned.
